company_domain.description: Primary domain of the target company, e.g., 'acmecorp.com'

company_name.description: Human-readable company name, used to improve search quality. If omitted, will be inferred from the domain.

depth.description: Research depth. 'quick' = snapshot + top triggers only; 'standard' = all sections, capped at 10 searches; 'deep' = full research with no search cap and full page fetches.
